text: There are no apparent adverse site conditions, easements, encroachments, environmental conditions, or land uses. The subject consists of two adjoining parcels that are being conveyed together and are currently used as one integrated residential site. The primary parcel contains the dwelling, while the adjoining parcel contains garage improvements and is additionally impacted by an existing garage improvement located across the common lot line. Independent buildability of the secondary parcel was not relied upon in this analysis. Based on the existing configuration and current utility of the improvements, the property was analyzed and valued as a single economic unit.
